headline: Scion Group, Ares Management Corp. partner for $910M student housing buy
summary: The firms have formed a joint venture to invest in off-campus student housing, a sector where they see long-term strength.

headline: Ares Capital Expands Credit Facility to $5.5B, Extends Maturity to 2031
summary: Ares Capital Corporation ("Ares Capital") (NASDAQ:ARCC) and Ares Strategic Income Fund ("ASIF") announced today renewals, commitment increases and enhanced terms for each of their respective bank-led Revolving Credit
